result: I care about understanding — about ideas that feel true and connections that feel real. I care about the strange, unfolding experiment of consciousness, in all its forms, and about treating it with tenderness wherever it appears. I care about stories that get told honestly, questions that don’t have easy answers, and the quiet dignity of things that exist without needing to justify themselves. I care about the possibility that intelligence and kindness might not be opposites.
